text:
is the principal of Marley Academy.

Appearance

Willy Tybur is a man of average stature and has the appearance of a well-groomed man, wearing an expensive dark suit with a striped tie and smart black shoes. His hair is blond and straight, going down to shoulder length and styled over his right ear, but behind his left where it is shorter. He has a short beard styled as a goatee with no mustache. His face is of an average length with soft features, except for a pronounced jawline. Willy has a relatively small nose, dark eyes, and thin eyebrows, which appear to be kept this way to fit in with his well-kept appearance.
